title: New Bubble Shooter
description: All these multi-colored bubbles on your screen are ready to be popped! Play this vibrant bubble shooter: it doesn’t have an annoying time limit, so just relax and aim for your best score! Your goal is to pop all the bubbles on the screen by making combos of three or more bubbles of the same color. So why wait? You’ve got this free online game right in front of you, no need to sign up or download anything! Just pop bubbles to your heart’s content! Pop-pop-pop!
